prestazioni: K20C1 2.0L VTEC Turbo engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade to a Garrett GT3076R Gen II with billet compressor wheel (62mm inducer, 82mm exducer) and 0.82 A/R turbine housing, paired with a PRL Motorsports short ram intake with heat-shielded 4-inch inlet pipe and a custom 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system featuring a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust with dual 100mm outlets and a secondary catalytic converter delete (replaced with a GReddy EVO-R 300-cell race cat for emissions compliance in track-only builds).

Engine internals reinforcement: Forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (8.5:1 compression ratio) with upgraded wrist pins, Manley H-beam connecting rods (2000HP-rated), and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons, paired with a Kelford 272/280-degree camshaft set (intake/exhaust) and upgraded valve springs/retainers from Supertech Performance. Oil system upgraded with a Moroso 7-quart baffled oil pan, Mocal oil cooler, and a Setrab 50-row front-mount intercooler with custom piping.

Drivetrain and handling: OS Giken Super Lock limited-slip differential with 2.5-way torque bias, paired with a K-Tuned 6-speed short shifter and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (800Nm torque capacity). Suspension overhaul includes Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs, poly bushings from Whiteline (front control arms, rear trailing arms), and a full Cusco front strut tower bar and rear subframe brace. Braking system features AP Racing CP9430 front 6-pot calipers with 380mm two-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a custom brake cooling duct setup using APR Performance carbon fiber ducts.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (FK8-specific) with extended front fenders (30mm per side), rear quarter panels (50mm per side), and a custom carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards. Rear diffuser from Seibon Carbon with dual 100mm exhaust cutouts and a custom GT wing from APR Performance (1800mm width, 300mm chord, 3D-printed aluminum endplates).

Full carbon fiber hood from Seibon Carbon (FK8-specific) with a custom vented design for intercooler airflow, paired with a custom carbon fiber roof wrap using 3M 1080 series matte black vinyl. Front bumper lip from Verus Engineering with integrated tow hooks and a custom LED light bar setup using Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro lights (amber fogs, white DRLs).

Interior overhaul: Full Recaro SPG XL bucket seats with custom Takata Drift III harnesses (6-point, FIA-approved), paired with a NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub and a MOMO Mod.77 carbon fiber steering wheel. Custom roll cage from Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded, chromoly steel) with integrated fire suppression system from SPA Technique. Shift knob upgraded to a weighted titanium unit from K-Tuned, and door cards replaced with custom carbon fiber panels from Seibon with integrated LED accent lighting.
